title: satureja tenuis var. soriae
intro: Satureja tenuis var. soriae, also known as Soria savory, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Satureja tenuis var. soriae include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory problems, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Soria savory can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
